subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest these souls from among the beloved ones who have turned unto Thee with radiant faces and overflowing hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی تری هولاء جما من الاحباء اقبلوا الیک بوجوه نوراء و قلوب طافحه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @thankfulness; gratitude
